set.body:
## Phase 3 — Honest APIs (no fakes, no theater)

- H1. Workspace: wire buffers into LU/Cholesky/QR for real (compute in workspace
  arrays; add private[gale] fromArrayOwned to skip defensive clones) or delete the
  overloads — Factorizations.scala:88-89,133-134,143-172,174-259.
- H2. BlockJacobi: implement real block inverses or delete — Solvers.scala:70-73;
  fix placebo test SolverApiSuite.scala:36.
- H3. Rename lsqr → cgnr, or implement genuine Golub–Kahan LSQR —
  Solvers.scala:284-296. PRD requires LSQR/LSMR eventually.
- H4. FactorizationDiagnostics: populate (condition estimate, residual norm) or
  shrink; decide LAPACK-style info>0 completed factorization vs Left for singular LU;
  delete unreachable LU.isSingular — Factorizations.scala:34-52.
- H5. conditionEstimate: rename (exact inverse, O(n^3)) or implement Hager/Higham
  1-norm estimator — Factorizations.scala:267-298.
set.title: Remediation P3: honest APIs — no fakes, no theater (workspace, BlockJacobi, lsqr, diagnostics, conditionEstimate)
